questions.question_text_full: Select the correct active form of the given sentence. The man eating tiger will be captured tomorrow by the forest officers.

options.text: The forest officers will have captured the man eating tiger tomorrow.
The forest officers will capture the man eating tiger tomorrow.
The forest officers will be capturing the man eating tiger tomorrow.
The man eating tiger will capture the forest officers tomorrow.

questions.correct_option_text: The forest officers will capture the man eating tiger tomorrow.

questions.question_text_full: Select the most appropriate indirect form of the given sentence. Taru said, “Kavya is going to her grandmother’s house today for the weekend.”

options.text: Taru said that Kavya is going to her grandmother’s house today for the weekend.
Taru said that Kavya has gone to her grandmother’s house that day for the weekend.
Taru said that Kavya was going to her grandmother’s house today for the weekend.
Taru said that Kavya was going to her grandmother’s house that day for the weekend.

questions.correct_option_text: Taru said that Kavya was going to her grandmother’s house that day for the weekend.

questions.question_text_full: Select the most appropriate indirect form of the given sentence. The teacher said to the parents, “Young children are very restless.”

options.text: The teacher said the parents that young children are very restless.
The teacher told the parents that young children had been very restless.
The teacher told the parents that young children were very restless.
The teacher asked the parents if young children are very restless.

questions.correct_option_text: The teacher told the parents that young children were very restless.

questions.question_text_full: Select the most appropriate indirect form of the given sentence. “Press button A to start the machine,” said the instructor to the trainees.

options.text: The instructor said to the trainees that you should press button A to start the machine.
The instructor told the trainees to press button A to start the machine.
The instructor requested the trainees press button A to start the machine.
The instructor told the trainees that pressing button A would start the machine.

questions.correct_option_text: The instructor told the trainees to press button A to start the machine.
